reasoning: Koren, today’s workout is designed to tackle your poor lactate clearance and improve your aerobic base. After analyzing your 9.3% power drop-off between your 5-minute and 20-minute efforts, it's crucial to focus on fatigue resistance. Preparing with over-under intervals will help you stay strong during the key Sundance to Cascade Springs segment of the Alpine Loop. Your last ride indicated good recovery, so we're hitting it strong today, but still building back to peak effort.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 9 min blocks: 6 min at 209W, then 3 min at 242-256W; repeat for total of 5 sets

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
